553 P0100C_LMB_RSTRNT_BED_CD P0100C_LMB_RSTRNT_BED_CD P0100C Physical Restraints in Bed: Limb Restraint Bed Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the frequency that a limb restraint in bed was used. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not used
1=Used less than daily
2=Used Daily
